# New Tech Advertising (NTA)

New Tech Advertising helps business owners understand how businesses really grow and use advertising, knowledge, relationships, systems, and artificial intelligence more wisely.

**Founder & Digital Growth Guide™**: Rick Hesse

## NTA Knowledge Library
The NTA Knowledge Library is a connected learning journey for business owners. It consists of 7 collections and 49 lessons that cover growth, trust, relationships, advertising, AI, and building a connected business system.

**Knowledge Library Homepage**: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge

### Collections and Lessons

#### Business Foundations
- Collection URL: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/why-nta-exists
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/how-businesses-really-grow
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/marketing-is-not-magic
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/the-cost-of-bad-marketing
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/why-most-small-business-marketing-fails
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/the-power-of-digital-assets
  - Lesson: https://newtechadvertising.com/knowledge/business-foundations/the-nta-operating-system
